name: deriva-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins for the Deriva ecosystem — tier-1 core catalog skills (`deriva`) and tier-2 DerivaML ML-workflow skills (`deriva-ml`).

plugins.name: deriva
plugins.description: Tier-1 skills for working with Deriva catalogs via deriva-mcp-core — schema operations, table/column creation, vocabulary management, query patterns, Chaise display customization, and generic catalog troubleshooting.

plugins.name: deriva-ml
plugins.description: Tier-2 skills for DerivaML ML workflows — dataset lifecycle, executions, features, experiments, asset management, and Hydra-zen configs. Depends on the `deriva` plugin and the deriva-ml-mcp MCP plugin.
